description:
Add a test that instruments the pipeline and asserts type_module is called exactly 3 times, not 4.

## Implementation

Add a thread_local call counter in ir_typer.rs behind #[cfg(test)]:
```rust
#[cfg(test)]
thread_local! {
    pub static TYPE_MODULE_CALLS: std::cell::Cell<usize> = std::cell::Cell::new(0);
}
```
Increment in type_module (cfg(test) only).

Add a test in ir_codegen.rs (or a dedicated integration test) that:
1. Resets the counter.
2. Runs the full codegen pipeline on a trivial module.
3. Asserts TYPE_MODULE_CALLS == 3.

## Acceptance
- Test passes.
- One commit referencing fz-ty1.pip.3.
title: fz-ty1.pip.3: proof test — type_module called exactly 3× in pipeline
